zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough於1283年出生在英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas Davenport30歲，母親Agnes de Macclesfield25歲。他於1315年與Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough在英國爾達文波特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1350年在英國英格蘭爾享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾馬可特 迪平。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough于1283年出生在英国英格兰爾布拉哈爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Davenport30岁，母亲Agnes de Macclesfield25岁。他于1315年与Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough在英国爾達文波特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1350年在英国英格兰爾享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾馬可特 迪平。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough was born in 1283, in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Davenport, was 30 and his mother, Agnes de Macclesfield, was 25. He married Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough in 1315, in Davenport, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1350, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough est né en 1283, à Bramhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Davenport, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Macclesfield, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough en 1315, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1350, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough 1283 in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Davenport 30 und seine Mutter Agnes de Macclesfield 25. Er hat 1315 in Davenport, Cheshire, England Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1350 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Davenport Of Wheltroughが1283年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブラムハルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Davenportは30歳，母Agnes de Macclesfieldは25歳であった。1315年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトでElizabeth Cransley de Wheitroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1350年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアマーケト ディーパングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough(이)가 1283년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브램홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Davenport(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Macclesfield(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1315년 영국 체실르 대븐포트에서 Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 마크트 디핀그에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Davenport Of Wheltrough родился в 1283 г. в местности брамхолл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Davenport было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Macclesfield, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cransley de Wheitrough в 1315 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1350 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности маркет дипинг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
